holdings.infoBox: IYH is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 15.91%, Johnson & Johnson at 9.97%, AbbVie at 6.90%, UnitedHealth Group at 6.58%, and Merck & Co. at 5.02%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Healthcare ETF (IYH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks a cap-weighted index of pharmaceutical, biotechnology, health care services and equipment companies in the US. IYH was launched on Jun 12, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
